title: Airwick - Linen and White Orchid - Reeds 25ml 3 Pack - 5 Weeks of Long-Lasting Freshness, Elegant Home Decor, Neutralizes Odors, Enhances Room Ambiance
features: CREATE A WELCOMING ATMOSPHERE: Imagine the clean scent of just-washed linen with notes of white orchid, orange blossom, and a whisper of citrus to bring a delightful freshness

INFUSED WITH ESSENTIAL OILS: Surround yourself in the inviting scents of our nature-inspired fragrances, infused with natural essential oils which neutralise malodours in the kitchen, bathroom and living room
NATURE INSPIRED: Airwick Reed Diffusers use natural rattan stems to delicately diffuse wonderful long-lasting fragrance and improve your home fragrance for up to 6 weeks
LONG LASTING FRAGRANCE FOR UP TO 6 WEEKS: Scented liquid included in bottle lasts up to six weeks
Available in other fragrances, Recycle when empty
description: Product description Air Wick Reed Diffuser uses naturally derived rattan stems to delicately diffuse wonderful fragrances. Create a welcoming atmosphere in your home with its natural fragrance experience and elegant design. Air Wick Reed Diffusers help to rid of odours whilst providing an amazing fragrance experience to enjoy every day with your favourite fragrance. Directions Insert the reeds into the bottle containing the scented liquid. Place the diffuser in the desired location. Flip the reeds every few days to refresh the scent. Replace the reeds or the scented liquid when the fragrance is no longer noticeable. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Ensure proper ventilation during use. Safety Warning Avoid direct skin contact with undiluted essential oils. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Ensure proper ventilation during use. See more
